name: gate-unsendable
notes: Telegram is down. The fresh questions were generated and validated, but the veto message could not be confirmed sent — so the founder was never actually offered the chance to veto them. The fail-safe direction is the whole point: a gate that was never OFFERED counts as a veto. The fresh slice is DROPPED, not auto-released, and the fixture ships a base-only pack. The opposite behaviour — auto-releasing questions nobody was given the chance to stop — is the one thing the veto-with-timeout design must never do.
